name: El Indio Azteca Joyeria
description_short: El Indio Azteca Joyeria LLC is a newly established jewelry pawn shop based in Miami, FL, operating as a Florida Limited Liability Company since March 2025.
description_long:
El Indio Azteca Joyeria LLC is a freshly incorporated Florida Limited Liability Company that was established on March 14, 2025, and is currently operating in active status with the Florida Department of State. The company is registered under document number L25000126531 and maintains its principal and mailing address at 2851 NW 7th St, Miami, FL 33125 in the Allapattah neighborhood. The business is overseen by registered agent Israel I. Monteagudo, with authorized members Lissette Chagui and Israel I. Monteagudo guiding operations.

As a pawn shop focused on jewelry (indicated by the name "El Indio Azteca Joyeria"), the company operates in the collateral-based lending and precious metals/jewelry sector. The business model typically involves accepting jewelry and gold items as collateral for short-term loans or purchasing used jewelry and gold directly from consumers.

Being a newly established entity (less than one year in operation as of the profile date), El Indio Azteca Joyeria represents a startup operation in the Miami pawn and jewelry market. The company has not yet filed annual reports, which is consistent with its recent establishment date. The business appears to be locally owned and operated with Miami-based principals managing all aspects of the operation.

Potential customers should be aware that this is a brand-new business with minimal operating history. While the company is properly registered and in active compliance with Florida state requirements, consumers should conduct due diligence regarding pricing, terms, and service quality before engaging with the business, as there is no established track record or customer reviews available to assess performance.
pros: Properly registered Florida Limited Liability Company with active status as of November 2025
Established legal entity with document number L25000126531 through Florida Department of State
Located in Miami with local ownership and on-site management by registered principals
Compliant business structure with designated registered agent for legal accountability
Focus on jewelry and gold specialization indicated by company name and category
cons: Brand new business established March 14, 2025 with no operating history or customer reviews to evaluate
No Federal EIN/FEI number on file, which may limit certain business operations and financing options
No annual reports filed yet, limiting transparency into financial performance and business activities
Insufficient market data or consumer feedback available to assess pricing, terms, or service quality
Unknown pawn loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, and jewelry valuation methodology not publicly disclosed
best_for: Miami-area residents needing quick collateral-based loans using jewelry or gold items
Individuals looking to sell used jewelry or gold to a local buyer
Consumers seeking an alternative to traditional pawn shops for jewelry-specific transactions
diagnosis: El Indio Azteca Joyeria is best for Miami residents who need quick cash through jewelry collateral loans or want to sell gold and jewelry items locally. However, the critical caveat is that this is a startup business established in March 2025 with zero operating history, no publicly available pricing information, no customer reviews, and no disclosed terms—making it impossible to assess reliability, fair pricing, or service quality before engaging.
services: Pawn loans using jewelry as collateral
